headlines.headline: Betting tips, DFS picks for Sunday's NBA playoff games
headlines.description: Jim McCormick breaks down Sunday's NBA playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Charles Barkley: Talking with Michael Jordan again after rift
headlines.description: Charles Barkley says he and Michael Jordan are talking again after nearly 15 years and that the two plan to play golf together in the offseason.

headlines.headline: Are the Spurs the Thunder's biggest threat in the West?
headlines.description: Quentin Richardson joins "SportsCenter" to discuss Victor Wembanyama's playoff debut and why the Spurs are the biggest threat to the Thunder in the Western Conference.

headlines.headline: Denver hosts Minnesota with 1-0 series lead
headlines.description: Minnesota Timberwolves (49-33, sixth in the Western Conference) vs. Denver Nuggets (54-28, third in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: Cleveland takes 1-0 lead into game 2 against Toronto
headlines.description: Toronto Raptors (46-36, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Cleveland Cavaliers (52-30, fourth in the Eastern Conference)

headlines.headline: Oklahoma City hosts Phoenix to start playoffs
headlines.description: Phoenix Suns (45-37, seventh in the Western Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (64-18, first in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: Bengals sign DT Dexter Lawrence to one-year, $28M extension
headlines.description: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and has signed a one-year, $28 million extension with Cincinnati, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Sunday.

headlines.headline: Fowler: Giants in position to control first half of NFL draft
headlines.description: Jeremy Fowler discusses the many options the Giants have in the first round after trading Dexter Lawrence II for the 10th pick of the NFL draft.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Mel Kiper's favorite prospects by position
headlines.description: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list of NFL draft favorites includes two speedy receivers, three undersized cornerbacks and some gritty linemen.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Jeff Legwold ranks the top 100 prospects
headlines.description: Jeff Legwold reveals his list of top NFL draft prospects for 2026, which is based purely on talent. Who is No. 1 on this year's Leggy 100?

headlines.headline: McCourtys talk Patriots' NFL draft must-haves, needs, wants
headlines.description: The former Patriots analyze what positions the team needs to target when the NFL draft starts Thursday.

headlines.headline: Jimmy Johnson has advice for Jets' stockpile of draft picks
headlines.description: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: Eight new teams open their postseason Sunday. Here's what to watch, along with Saturday's highlights and stats.

headlines.headline: Flyers bring 1-0 series lead into game 2 against the Penguins
headlines.description: Philadelphia Flyers (43-27-12, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Pittsburgh Penguins (41-25-16, in the Metropolitan Division)

headlines.headline: Oilers host the Ducks to begin the NHL Playoffs
headlines.description: Anaheim Ducks (43-33-6, in the Pacific Division) vs. Edmonton Oilers (41-30-11, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: Minnesota brings 1-0 series lead into game 2 against Dallas
headlines.description: Minnesota Wild (46-24-12, in the Central Division) vs. Dallas Stars (50-20-12, in the Central Division)

headlines.headline: Flyers win Game 1 over Penguins in grand return to playoffs
headlines.description: Porter Martone, Philadelphia's 19-year-old rookie forward, scored the eventual winner with 2:37 to play as the Flyers outlasted the rival Penguins 3-2 in the opener of their Eastern Conference quarterfinal series.
